Package org.eventb.ui.tests

Class TestEventBUtils

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.tests.utils.EventBUITest
org.eventb.ui.tests.TestEventBUtils
public class TestEventBUtils extends EventBUITest
Unit tests for static methods of class EventBUtils.

    Fields inherited from class org.eventb.ui.tests.utils.EventBUITest

    ff, rodinProject, workspace

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TestEventBUtils()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    assertAbstractEvent(IEvent event, IEvent expected)
     
    private void
    assertAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot machine, IMachineRoot expected)
     
    private void
    assertFreeChildName(int expected, IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String prefix)
     
    private void
    assertImplicitChildren(IEvent event, IRodinElement... expected)
     
    private static void
    assertNotReadOnly(IInternalElement element)
     
    private static void
    assertReadOnly(IInternalElement element)
     
    private static void
    setGenerated(IInternalElement element)
     
    void
    testAbstractEventDifferentName()
    Ensures that an event has an abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause and the event has a refines event clause to an event of the abstract machine with a different name.
    void
    testAbstractEventInexistent()
    Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause and the event has a refines event clause to an event that doesn't exist in the abstract machine.
    void
    testAbstractEventINITIALISATION()
    Ensures that the abstraction of the INITIALISATION event is correctly returned.
    void
    testAbstractEventNoAbstractMachine()
    Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause, but pointing to an inexistent machine (even if the event has a refines event clause).
    void
    testAbstractEventNoRefinesEvent()
    Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause, but the event has no refines event clause.
    void
    testAbstractEventNoRefinesMachine()
    Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has no refines machine clause (even if the event has a refines event clause).
    void
    testAbstractEventSameName()
    Ensures that an event has an abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause and the event has a refines event clause to an event of the abstract machine with the same name.
    void
    testAbstractMachineNoRefinesClause()
    Ensures that a machine without a refines clause has no abstract machine.
    void
    testAbstractMachineTwoRefinesClause()
    Ensures that a machine with two refines clauses has no abstract machine.
    void
    testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClause()
    Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine.
    void
    testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToInexistent()
    Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine, even when the file doesn't exist.
    void
    testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToItself()
    Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine that can be itself.
    void
    testGetFreeChildNameNone()
    Ensures that the first free child name is numbered "1".
    void
    testGetFreeChildNameNth()
    Ensures that the nth free child name is numbered 1 greater than the greatest children.
    void
    testGetFreeChildNameOne()
    Ensures that the second free child name is numbered "2".
    void
    testImplicitChildrenMultiple()
    Ensures that the children of several abstractions of an extended event are properly returned, when some abstract event are themselves extended.
    void
    testImplicitChildrenNoAbstraction()
    Ensures that no children is returned for an event that has no abstraction.
    void
    testImplicitChildrenNotExtended()
    Ensures that no children is returned for an event that is not extended.
    void
    testImplicitChildrenSimple()
    Ensures that the children of the abstraction of an extended event are properly returned, when the abstract event is not itself extended.
    void
    testImplicitChildrenTop()
    Ensures that no children is returned for an event of a top-level machine.
    void
    testIsReadOnlyInternalElement()
    Ensures that a generated element (bearing the generated attribute) is read only.
    void
    testIsReadOnlyRoot()
    Ensures that a generated root element (bearing the generated attribute) is read only as well as its descendants.
    void
    testIsReadOnlySubTree()
    Ensures that elements inside a generated subtree are read only and elements outside are not read only.

    Methods inherited from class org.eventb.ui.tests.utils.EventBUITest

    createAction, createAxiom, createContext, createEvent, createExtendsContextClause, createGuard, createInternalElement, createInvariant, createMachine, createNAxioms, createNEvents, createParameter, createRefinesEventClause, createRefinesMachineClause, createRodinProject, createSeesContextClause, createVariant, createWitness, getContextRoot, getMachineRoot, openEditor, setUp, tearDown

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • assertAbstractMachine

      private void assertAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot machine, IMachineRoot expected) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testAbstractMachineNoRefinesClause

      public void testAbstractMachineNoRefinesClause() throws Exception
      Ensures that a machine without a refines clause has no abstract machine.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

    • testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClause

      public void testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClause() throws Exception
      Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

    • testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToInexistent

      public void testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToInexistent() throws Exception
      Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine, even when the file doesn't exist.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

    • testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToItself

      public void testAbstractMachineWithRefinesClauseToItself() throws Exception
      Ensures that a machine with a refines clause has an abstract machine that can be itself.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

    • testAbstractMachineTwoRefinesClause

      public void testAbstractMachineTwoRefinesClause() throws Exception
      Ensures that a machine with two refines clauses has no abstract machine.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractMachine(IMachineRoot)

      private void assertAbstractEvent(IEvent event, IEvent expected) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testAbstractEventNoRefinesMachine

      public void testAbstractEventNoRefinesMachine() throws Exception
      Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has no refines machine clause (even if the event has a refines event clause).
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractEvent(IEvent)

    • testAbstractEventNoAbstractMachine

      public void testAbstractEventNoAbstractMachine() throws Exception
      Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause, but pointing to an inexistent machine (even if the event has a refines event clause).
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractEvent(IEvent)

    • testAbstractEventNoRefinesEvent

      public void testAbstractEventNoRefinesEvent() throws Exception
      Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause, but the event has no refines event clause.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractEvent(IEvent)

    • testAbstractEventInexistent

      public void testAbstractEventInexistent() throws Exception
      Ensures that an event has no abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause and the event has a refines event clause to an event that doesn't exist in the abstract machine.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractEvent(IEvent)

      public void testAbstractEventSameName() throws Exception
      Ensures that an event has an abstraction when its machine has a refines machine clause and the event has a refines event clause to an event of the abstract machine with the same name.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getAbstractEvent(IEvent)

      public void testGetFreeChildNameNth() throws Exception

      Throws:
      Exception

      • EventBUtils.getFreeChildName(IInternalElement, IInternalElementType, String)

      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getImplicitChildren(IEvent)

    • testImplicitChildrenSimple

      public void testImplicitChildrenSimple() throws Exception
      Ensures that the children of the abstraction of an extended event are properly returned, when the abstract event is not itself extended.
      Throws:
      Exception
      See Also:
      • EventBUtils.getImplicitChildren(IEvent)

      public void testImplicitChildrenMultiple() throws Exception
      Ensures that the children of several abstractions of an extended event are properly returned, when some abstract event are themselves extended.
      Throws:
      Exception

      • EventBUtils.getImplicitChildren(IEvent)
